heading: This Afternoon
text: Mostly sunny. Highs in the low to mid 80s. Southwest winds gusting to 20 mph, except gusting to 30 mph in the Champlain Valley, and to 40 mph in the St. Lawrence Valley.

heading: Tonight
text: Fair early; increasing clouds late. Slight chance of a shower far north. Lows from the mid 50s to around 60. Southwest winds decreasing to 5 to 10 mph, except gusting to 35 mph early near the international border.

heading: Wednesday
text: Variable clouds. Slight chance of a shower; a thunderstorm possible far south. Highs from upper 70s to mid 80s in the south, and mid 70s to around 80 north, with some lower 70s far north. Northwest winds 5 to 10 mph, gusting to 20 mph.
